title: rosa × dumetorum subsp. nitidula
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subsp. nitidula is a hybrid rose species, specifically a subspecies of Rosa dumetorum, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and anthocyanins, which provide its medicinal properties and contribute to its health benefits. Rosa × dumetorum subsp. nitidula has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in skincare products to take advantage of its potential health benefits.
